title: Call of the Titan
description: Call of the Titan is a mod that introduces over 50 new features to enhance your Minecraft experience. These include exciting new biomes, structures, mobs, items, and blocks, offering endless possibilities for exploration, adventure, and challenge.
body:
Are you tired of Minecraft's lack of challenging bosses? If so, Call of the Titan is the perfect mod for you! This mod introduces massive titan-like creatures scattered across new structures throughout your world. Defeat these colossal bosses and earn unique items to craft powerful new tools.

📥 Installation Guide:
Required: Geckolib (ensure it's installed for the mod to function correctly)
Not sure if the mod worked?
Open the Minecraft menu, go to your mods settings, and search for Call of the Titan to confirm it's installed.
What does this mod add?
Great question! Call of the Titan introduces a variety of exciting new content, including:


New biomes to explore
Fierce new mobs
Unique blocks and items
Massive new structures to discover
This mod guarantees endless hours of fun as you venture into new territories, collect rare resources, and take on powerful new bosses. Ready to face the titans?
